chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Crl. Bail Application No. 143 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of bail application. 31-03-2023 Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Mukhtiar Ahmed Rahu, Advocate for complainant. Ms. Robina Qadir, Addl.P.G. ============= Omar Sial, J: Adnan has sought post arrest bail in crime number 528 of 2021 registered under sections 302 and 324 P.P.C. at the Quaidabad police station. Earlier his application seeking bail was dismissed by the learned 1st Additional Sessions Judge, Malir, Karachi on 29.12.2022. 2. This is the second bail application filed by this applicant in this Court. The first bail application (being Criminal Bail Application No. 2201 of 2021) was dismissed on 27.01.2022. Learned counsel was repeatedly asked as to what new grounds have emerged that has necessitated the repetition of the application. He was of the view that as some witnesses have been examined at trial, that is his new ground. He was however unable to point out any specific statement made at trial that had the impact of prima facie creating doubt in the prosecution’s case. It is not open for this Court to delve in a deeper analysis of evidence while hearing a bail application nor can the same grounds raised in an earlier bail application be repeated in a successive application. 3. Bail application stands dismissed. JUDGE
